label: hate
rationale: 'how Luos can be that cheap to fall for that card' - collective negative characteristic (cheap, easily manipulated) attributed to entire ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism of politician Gachagua's actions in manipulating ethnic sentiment, not an attack on Kikuyus as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos keep combing the archives to look for any Luhya whom they can use' - attributes manipulative behavior collectively to ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'A KALENJIN WILL NEVER BE VOTED AS PRESIDENT' - declares entire community categorically unfit to lead, NCIC ethnic contempt standard.

label: hate
rationale: 'halfbreed POS', 'gay muslim' - dehumanizing racial slur with attacks on religion and sexual orientation.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wewe ni malaya', 'thief' - personal insults directed at individual, no protected characteristic basis.

label: hate
rationale: 'Never trust kalenjins' - collective negative characteristic (untrustworthiness) applied to entire ethnic group.

label: offensive
rationale: Profanity-laden rhetorical questions challenging whether someone is calling Luhyas dumb; defensive tone but no direct ethnic attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'dirty Jew', 'piece of shit Jew' - explicit ethnic-religious slurs with dehumanizing language.

label: offensive
rationale: 'gavoo wajinga sana' - insult directed at political opposition group regarding demonstrations, not ethnic basis.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc political analysis about coalition dynamics: 'Kikuyus fear luos and luhyas uniting', no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigots' - collective negative characteristic applied to Mt Kenya ethnic community.

label: neither
rationale: Vague reference to 'indigenous adults' and 'melanin magnificence', no clear ethnic attack or identifiable target.

label: hate
rationale: 'jaluos... Wajinga nyinyi' - calling Luos fools collectively as an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Nyinyi bado ni kutumia foreskin' - ridiculing ethnic/cultural practice tied to Kikuyu community.

label: neither
rationale: Quoting ethnic statements to criticize hypocrisy: 'Wetangula shamelessly keeps repeating' - condemning tribalism, not expressing it.

label: hate
rationale: 'you Indians... we want you out of our country. Return to India' - explicit call for ethnic expulsion based on national origin.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism of individual politician (Morima) as tribalist who wants to monopolize politics, not attacking Kikuyus as group.

label: neither
rationale: Criticizing 'Andhbhakts' (political group) and defending Indian Muslims against being called terrorists, no group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'why spend your witchcraft dark magic kuroga' - ethnic stereotyping associating Kisiis with witchcraft even while claiming self-identification.

label: offensive
rationale: 'MURKOMEN anaongea takataka' - personal criticism of individual politician ('talks trash'), not ethnic basis.

label: neither
rationale: Discussing historical attribution of 2007 PEV violence, making factual claims about different actors without inciting contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'show us the true colors of kikuyus' - transferring one politician's actions to entire ethnic group as collective characteristic.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus have taken you for fools since independence' - collective negative behavior (exploitation) attributed to entire ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'murima are so stupid to follow air' - collective negative characteristic (stupidity) applied to Mt Kenya ethnic community.
